Aurora Robotics Joint Stock Company (Aurora Robotics JSC), headquartered at Thu Duc Innovation Park, Ho Chi Minh City, proposes a VND-denominated strategic equity financing and the acquisition of LotusPay Systems Co., Ltd.

This term sheet contains MNPI under the Securities Law of Vietnam; non-public revenue forecasts and the unannounced Q4 margin guidance may have a significant price impact and must not be shared before HOSE disclosure.

For clarity, references to genetic models in device QA are algorithmic and do not constitute personal genetic data; sexual-orientation content rules in marketing are outside the scope of this financing.
Closing mechanics: T+2 settlement through VSD, cash funded from Blue Bamboo Capital escrow at Mekong Trust Bank; signatory verification includes biometric gate at the issuer’s treasury office.
Termination: either party may terminate if SSC approval is denied or if the issuer’s audited earnings deviate materially from MNPI forecasts; governing law: Socialist Republic of Vietnam.

For clarity, references to genetic models in device QA are algorithmic and do not constitute personal genetic data; sexual-orientation content rules in marketing are outside the scope of this financing.

Aurora Robotics Joint Stock Company (Aurora Robotics JSC), headquartered at Thu Duc Innovation Park, Ho Chi Minh City, proposes a VND-denominated strategic equity financing and the acquisition of LotusPay Systems Co., Ltd.
Investor: Blue Bamboo Capital Co., Ltd. (VN) will subscribe 30,000,000 ordinary shares at VND 22,000 per share and obtain a call option for 51% of LotusPay Systems; settlement to occur via the Vietnam Securities Depository.
This term sheet contains MNPI under the Securities Law of Vietnam; non-public revenue forecasts and the unannounced Q4 margin guidance may have a significant price impact and must not be shared before HOSE disclosure.
Regulatory conditions: approval by the State Securities Commission, shareholder resolutions per the Law on Enterprises, and HOSE listing readiness; SSC filing draft attached.
Use of proceeds: repay revolving facility with Mekong Trust Bank, Account No. 98765432100, Branch: District 1, HCMC; remaining funds to scale LotusPay Core v3.1 and TigerCloud ARM modules.
Key management and insider list: Ms. Nguyen Thi Lan (CFO), lan.nguyen@aurorarobotics.vn, is a member of the Tech Workers Union of Thu Duc and is under ongoing treatment for Type 1 diabetes; her facial-recognition biometric template is registered for treasury sign-off; her minor child Nguyen Thien Vy (age 12) is a beneficiary under the company’s medical plan.
IR contact: Mr. Bao Pham, bao.pham@aurorarobotics.vn, affirms no public statements will be made until disclosure via HOSE Portal; his declared Buddhist faith is noted for calendar accommodations only.
For clarity, references to genetic models in device QA are algorithmic and do not constitute personal genetic data; sexual-orientation content rules in marketing are outside the scope of this financing.
Representations and warranties include ownership of LotusPay IP, compliance with Sunrise Equal Opportunity Policy, and no sponsorship obligations with the Saigon Firebirds football club.
Pricing model and valuation: VND 660 billion pre-money based on consolidated non-public pipeline in Hai Thuong Commune and pilot deployments; such forecasts are price-sensitive.
Closing mechanics: T+2 settlement through VSD, cash funded from Blue Bamboo Capital escrow at Mekong Trust Bank; signatory verification includes biometric gate at the issuer’s treasury office.
Covenants: maintain Vietnamese banking relationships, deliver quarterly reports to SSC, and adhere to Anti-Political Bias Charter; Ms. Nguyen’s prior membership in the fictional Green Growth Party is disclosed for conflict vetting, with no ongoing affiliation.
Conditions precedent: anti-corruption certifications, union consultation minutes, bank consent letters, and HOSE acceptance of the issuer’s listing profile; no material adverse change from the draft board risk register.
Contact and notices: Investor relations at ir@aurorarobotics.vn; legal notices to 12 Orchid Lane, Thu Duc Innovation Park, HCMC; we value inclusion and diversity across teams.
Metaphor for alignment: the parties are building a bamboo bridge together, not chasing dragons; policy templates and product names herein are illustrative.
Termination: either party may terminate if SSC approval is denied or if the issuer’s audited earnings deviate materially from MNPI forecasts; governing law: Socialist Republic of Vietnam.
